name: Arthur Schwartz
abstract: Arthur Schwartz (November 25, 1900 – September 3, 1984) was an American composer and film producer, widely noted for his songwriting collaborations with Howard Dietz.

concerts.label: An Evening at Carnegie Hall to Benefit the Ecole Francaise
